transcript: Good afternoon, packaging store. May I help you?
Oh, yes, I was wondering if you could package, uh, a little bit of Nipper for me?
Good afternoon, packaging store. May I help you?
Um, yes, I was wondering how much it would be to package ten pounds of Nipper.
Hey, I got more things to do--
--than play these silly games, okay? I know who you are, so, just keep it up and you're gonna have a Jefferson County Sheriffs call on you.
See, I was just asking if you could--
Good afternoon, packaging store. May I help you?
Yes, sir. Nipper is a gardening product.
Then bring it in, I'll be glad to pack it up.
How much would about ten pounds of it cost to be packaged, is what I'm asking.
I don't know, I've never seen it, so, sight unseen it's hard to ask... find out.
Good afternoon, packaging store. May I help you?
Um, yes, sir, I was wondering whether... if when it was packaged, would it be a problem to conceal Nipper?
There's a federal law against this sort of stuff. Did you know that?
Would you conceal Nipper for me?
Would you conceal Nipper in an artichoke?
I don't know. If you... if you want to bring it in here, I'll take a look at it and pack it up, otherwise-- '[beep]' --don't bother me, okay?
So you would conceal Nipper into an artichoke for me?
Go get me a Jolly Rancher real fast, will ya?
Good afternoon, packaging store. May I help you?
Um, yes, sir, I was wondering if it would be a problem to package a Nerf football?
Bring it over and I'll take a look at it.
